ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "nominal_id" REAL /* Nominal ID of the product */,
  "nominal_od" REAL /* Nominal OD of the product */,
  "wall_thickness" REAL /* Wall thickness of the product */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the product */,
  "exterior_material" TEXT /* Exterior material of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product line was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the attribute was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_attributes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory belongs to */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the warehouse was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'processing', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the item is */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation is for */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product recommended */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the analytics are for */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of sales of the product */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the product */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data is for */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the analytics entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_values" (
  "attribute_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute value */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute the value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the attribute value was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the attribute value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_values_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES product_attributes ("attribute_id")
)
